## cilium-dbg bpf ipcache update

Update an entry for an ip

```
cilium-dbg bpf ipcache update [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --encryptkey uint8        Encrypt key
  -h, --help                    help for update
      --identity uint32         Identity, e.g. 14170
      --ip string               IP address, e.g. 10.244.1.217/32
      --skiptunnel              Skip tunnel
      --tunnelendpoint string   Tunnel endpoint, e.g. 172.21.0.3
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --config string   Config file (default is $HOME/.cilium.yaml)
  -D, --debug           Enable debug messages
  -H, --host string     URI to server-side API
```
